description: T-090.3.1 golden for one objects/chunks/{cx}_{cy}.json.gz payload (gunzipped). `chunk` mirrors the production file content byte-shape: {instances: [[prefabId, x, y, z, rotationDeg], ...]} — all-number 5-tuples (map-object-instance chunk wire branch), sorted by (x, y, prefabId). prefabIds pair with map-object-prefabs-sample.json (bundle isolation, S6). cx=1 means x ∈ [512, 1024): the 512.0 row pins the half-open floor partition (G6) — x exactly on the boundary belongs to THIS chunk, never cell 0.
